You'll own services written in Go and Python, backed by PostgreSQL and Kafka. 6+ years of backend experience required. Kubernetes experience is a strong plus.

Machine Learning Engineer at Vertex AI Solutions (San Francisco, hybrid). Build and deploy recommendation models. Strong Python, PyTorch, and experience serving models in production. 3-5 years of ML experience. $170,000 to $210,000 annually. MS in Computer Science preferred.

Android Engineer (Contract, 12 months). Remote, EU-based candidates only. Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. You'll work on a fintech app used by millions. €70-€90/hour depending on experience. Minimum 4 years Android development.

VP of Engineering - Helios Robotics. Scale our engineering org from 30 to 100. Report directly to the CEO. Deep technical background plus 10+ years leadership. Equity-heavy comp. Based in Boston, hybrid.

Customer Support Representative. Temporary role through the holiday season (Nov-Jan). Remote. Answer tickets via Zendesk and chat. Friendly attitude and clear written English a must. No experience required, paid training provided. $18/hour.
